source.title: What does the US military's feud with Anthropic mean for AI used in war?
source.summary: Anthropic's ongoing fight with the Department of Defense over safety restrictions on its Claude AI has become a test case for how AI may be used in military applications and government coercion of tech companies. The dispute centers on Anthropic's refusal to allow the government to use Claude for domestic mass surveillance or autonomous weapons systems. The Pentagon has declared Anthropic a supply chain risk, while Anthropic has vowed to challenge the designation in court.
